name: engineering-workflow
description: Unified engineering workflow: alignment → PRD → vertical-slice issues → AFK handoff → TDD execution → architectural sanity → triage → prototype. Run /init-workflow once per repo to seed the pipeline order in CLAUDE.md. Skills: grill-with-docs, context-bootstrap, to-prd, to-issues, agent-brief, triage, tdd-vertical, diagnose, zoom-out, deep-modules, prototype, review-fleet. v2.6.0: `review-fleet` default is now REPORT-ONLY (reviewers → judge → judged report, zero code changes); the full apply pipeline requires `--apply` (used by host-orchestrator's AFK review wave). v2.5.0: new `review-fleet` skill (explicit-invocation only) — multi-agent review pipeline: parallel reviewers per module (deep-modules lens + critical implementation lens, reuses review-flow's revisor_de_trabajo if installed) → judge on best model rules each finding APLICAR/RECHAZAR/HUMANO → applier subagents on best available model (Fable 5 → Opus) apply only approved fixes with build/test verification. v2.4.0: adopts upstream `prototype` skill (mattpocock/skills) verbatim — throwaway code that answers a design question, routes between a terminal TUI for state/logic prototypes and N radically different UI variants on one route for visual prototypes. v2.3.0: /to-issues now generates the agent brief inline for every AFK slice. /agent-brief gains a Reality-anchored principle + Real resources template section that validates concrete refs against .sandcastle/probes/*.schema if cached.
